items.title: Even with bigger birds, Starlink still 'best suited to low-density markets' – study
items.summary: As the new V3 satellite nears deployment, Starlink is poised to tack on gobs of capacity. But even with the V3, Starlink will skew to low-density markets in the US and beyond, says a new study.

items.summary: Interoperability across multi-vendor systems has emerged as the central challenge shaping open RAN deployments.

items.title: ISAC POC targets public safety use cases with drone defense
items.summary: The weaponization of drones adds a new dimension to security and public safety. As agencies prepare, some are looking to wireless network operators as potential partners.

items.title: The Shift Toward Proactive Broadband Maintenance
items.summary: What if your network could identify problems before customers notice them? Learn how AI and machine learning are helping broadband operators improve visibility, reduce repair times and move toward proactive network management.

items.title: Inside AT&T's industrial IoT logistics play
items.summary: AT&T is leveraging its Wiliot partnership to build its logistics business. And connectivity is just part of it.

items.title: T-Mobile's network chief has a different take on autonomous networks
items.summary: T-Mobile Chief Network Officer Ankur Kapoor says efforts that focus on vertical autonomy are doing things all wrong.

items.title: T-Mobile reshuffles executive ranks as Mike Katz exits
items.summary: T-Mobile’s Mike Katz is leaving. Chris Sambar is joining as chief enterprise officer and André Almeida is getting an expanded position as chief marketing, brand and broadband officer.
